thinking:
**Planning the Dashboard**

Okay, I'm mapping out the implementation now. My focus is on replacing lines 3333-3379 in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` to integrate the "All/Saved" tabs and the AI search, as per the design. I'm starting to sketch out the tab behavior and how to animate that `tabIndex`.


**Calculating the Bar Position**

I'm calculating the animated bar position now. Since the "Talent Bank" tabs use `w-44`, similar to "My Vacancies," the `tabIndex` will multiply by 176 (44rem/px width). I've got the index calculation down: `tabIndex = talentTab === 'todos' ? 0 : 1`.  Using Framer Motion, the purple bar will animate with `animate={{ x: tabIndex * 176 }}`. To align the bar precisely at the bottom, the container needs `relative border-b-0`. The design must be flexible for desktop and mobile layouts.

args.Description: "Move as abas de Todos/Salvos do Banco de Talentos para o cabeçalho superior colado, no modelo exato com ícones, caixa alta e barrinha roxa de seleção, ao lado da busca por IA."
args.toolAction: "Substituindo o cabeçalho inferior do Banco de Talentos para adicionar abas em formato idêntico e barra de busca por IA"
args.toolSummary: "Integrar abas e busca por IA no cabeçalho do Banco de Talentos"
